tools.description: Return Grabowski's bounded read/write policy and current local state.
tools.purpose: Read policy, deployment provenance and the current bounded operating mode.

tools.description: Return a task-oriented live operator context and explicit drift findings.
tools.purpose: Return a task-oriented live operator context and explicit drift findings.

tools.description: List one allowed directory without recursion or symlink traversal.
tools.purpose: List one allowed directory without recursive traversal.

tools.description: Return metadata and SHA-256 for one allowed regular file.
tools.purpose: Read metadata and a content hash for one allowed path.

tools.description: Read UTF-8 text from an allowed file and return a concurrency hash.
tools.purpose: Read bounded UTF-8 text and obtain a concurrency hash.

tools.description: Inspect one configured secret path without returning file content.
tools.purpose: Inspect metadata and bounded listings under explicit secret roots without returning content.

tools.description: Break-glass reveal after hash, justification and exposure acknowledgement.
tools.purpose: Break-glass reveal of bounded secret text with hash, justification and explicit context-exposure acknowledgement.

tools.description: Run one argv-only command with a secret exposed only through an fd/path.
tools.purpose: Run one argv-only command with a secret supplied through a file descriptor or restricted temporary path.

tools.description: Atomically export one secret to a configured local destination root.
tools.purpose: Create one local 0600 copy of a secret under configured export roots with a source hash precondition.

tools.description: Read bounded metadata/text under configured browser profile roots.
tools.purpose: Read bounded browser profile metadata and text, with binary databases kept metadata-only.

tools.description: Use this when a new UTF-8 text file must be created inside an allowed write root. It fails if the path already exists.
tools.purpose: Create one new UTF-8 file atomically inside an allowed write root.

tools.description: Use this when an existing allowed UTF-8 text file must be replaced atomically. The exact SHA-256 returned by grabowski_read_text or grabowski_stat is required.
tools.purpose: Replace one UTF-8 file atomically after a hash precondition and retain a backup.

tools.description: Remove one allowed regular file or empty directory into quarantine for audit-backed restoration.
tools.purpose: Remove one regular file or empty directory into quarantine after a typed precondition.

tools.description: Restore one path from a reversible audited filesystem removal transaction.
tools.purpose: Restore one path from an audited reversible filesystem removal.

tools.description: Irreversibly remove one allowed regular file or empty directory with a separate explicit capability.
tools.purpose: Irreversibly remove one regular file or empty directory with a separate explicit capability.

tools.description: Restore the quarantined preimage for one audited replace transaction.
tools.purpose: Restore a quarantined preimage from an audited replace transaction.

tools.description: Verify the tamper-evident write audit hash chain.
tools.purpose: Verify the tamper-evident write audit hash chain.

tools.description: Return the curated latest-complete Lens/repoLens bundle registry.
tools.purpose: Read the curated latest-complete Lens and repoLens bundle registry.

tools.description: Run one non-interactive command and return redacted output.
tools.purpose: Run one bounded non-interactive command as the current user.

tools.description: Start a durable background command as a transient user systemd unit.
tools.purpose: Start a durable bounded background command as a transient user service.

tools.description: Return durable metadata and current systemd status for one job.
tools.purpose: Read durable metadata and current service state for one Grabowski job.

tools.description: Read persistent stdout and stderr for one Grabowski job.
tools.purpose: Read redacted persistent output for one Grabowski job.

tools.description: Stop one Grabowski background job.
tools.purpose: Stop one Grabowski-owned background job.

tools.description: Run Git in one repository with protected-main force-push guard.
tools.purpose: Run Git in one repository with protected-main force-push protection.

tools.description: Create or switch one local Git branch through a typed operation.
tools.purpose: Create or switch local branches through a typed, audited branch operation.

tools.description: Run GitHub CLI with redacted output.
tools.purpose: Run GitHub CLI operations with output redaction.

tools.description: Inspect or control one user-level systemd service.
tools.purpose: Inspect or control one user-level systemd service.

tools.description: List tmux sessions visible to the current user.
tools.purpose: List tmux sessions visible to the current user.

tools.description: Capture text from one tmux pane.
tools.purpose: Read text from one tmux pane.

tools.description: Send literal text to one tmux pane, optionally followed by Enter.
tools.purpose: Send literal input to one tmux pane, optionally followed by Enter.

tools.description: List current-user processes, optionally filtered by a regex.
tools.purpose: List current-user processes with optional regular-expression filtering.

tools.description: Send TERM, INT, HUP or KILL to one process owned by the current user.
tools.purpose: Signal one process owned by the current user.

tools.description: List listening TCP and UDP sockets.
tools.purpose: List listening TCP and UDP sockets.

tools.description: Create a strict reference for a future privileged action without executing it.
tools.purpose: Create a non-executable reference contract for a future external privileged action.

tools.description: Return the validated local and SSH host registry.
tools.purpose: Return the validated local and SSH host registry.

tools.description: Run one argv command on one registered local or SSH host.
tools.purpose: Run one bounded argv command on one registered local or SSH host.

tools.description: List validated named operations.
tools.purpose: List validated named multi-step operations.

tools.description: Render one operation and its rollback path without executing it.
tools.purpose: Render a named operation and rollback path without executing it.

tools.description: Run preflight, action and postflight, then rollback after a failure.
tools.purpose: Run a named preflight/action/postflight operation with rollback after failure.

tools.description: Inspect the fail-closed root-owned privileged broker installation.
tools.purpose: Inspect the root-owned privileged broker installation without executing it.

tools.description: Start one persistent local or fleet task in its own systemd unit.
tools.purpose: Start a persistent local or fleet task in its own systemd unit.

tools.description: Observe one persistent task and refresh its recorded state.
tools.purpose: Observe one persistent task and refresh its recorded state.

tools.description: Read redacted journal output for one local or fleet task.
tools.purpose: Read redacted journal output for one local or fleet task.

tools.description: Stop one task process group and retain its persistent task record.
tools.purpose: Stop one task process group while retaining its persistent record.

tools.description: Recreate a missing or stopped task unit from its persistent record.
tools.purpose: Recreate a missing or stopped task unit from its persistent record.

tools.description: List recent persistent task records, optionally filtered by state.
tools.purpose: List recent persistent task records with optional state filtering.

tools.description: Evaluate the fail-closed recovery gate for power-worker activation.
tools.purpose: Evaluate the fail-closed recovery gate for power-worker activation.
